contentList.content: Shar or Selune? Porque no los dos??
Winning love by daylight, fighting evil by moonlight...
In the dark of the night terror will FIND YOU
Take some leather, add metal, make gloves!
Leather and moonlight, now with 50% more metal!
Armour for your Life Domain Selunite Cleric
Armour for your Light Domain Selunite Cleric
Armour for your Tempest Domain Selunite Cleric
Armour for your War Domain Selunite Cleric
Armour for your Life Domain Sharran Cleric
Armour for your Light Domain Sharran Cleric
Armour for your Tempest Domain Sharran Cleric
Armour for your War Domain Sharran Cleric
Starting at level 4, when you heal a creature, it gains a +[1] bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag> and <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> for [2] turns.
Starting at level 6, when the wearer heals a target, it gains an additional [1] <LSTag Tooltip="TemporaryHitPoints">temporary hit points</LSTag>.

Starting at level 8, when you heal a creature, it gains the effect of <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLADE_WARD">Blade Ward</LSTag>. When you <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Teleportation_Revivify">Revive</LSTag> a creature it gains the effect of <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DEATH_WARD">Death Ward</LSTag>.
By Medicine Life May Be Prolonged
Starting at level 4, you deal an additional [1] points of damage against creatures that are illuminated.
Starting at level 6, once per <LSTag Tooltip="LongRest">Long Rest</LSTag>, when your hit points are reduced to 0, you regain [2]. Allies within [1] also regain [3].
<LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag> increases by [1] at levels 4, 8, and 12.
Starting at level 8, when you deal [1], inflict [2] turns of <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MAG_THUNDER_REVERBERATION">Reverberation</LSTag> upon the target(s).
Blow Winds, and Crack Your Cheeks
Starting at level 4, when one of your spells deals [1] or [2], add your <LSTag Tooltip="SpellcastingAbilityModifier">Spellcasting Modifier</LSTag> to the damage dealt.

Starting at level 8, when the wearer deals Thunder damage to a <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MAG_THUNDER_REVERBERATION">Reverberating</LSTag> creature, it becomes <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DAZED">Dazed</LSTag> unless it succeeds a Constitution <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag>.
Starting at level 6, when you deal [1] or [2] inflict [3] turns of <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MAG_THUNDER_REVERBERATION">Reverberation</LSTag> upon the target(s).
I Came, I Saw, and Overcame
Starting at level 4, you gain a +[1] bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Spell Attack Rolls</LSTag>.
Starting at level 6, your weapon attacks deal an additional [1].
Starting at level 6, your weapon attacks deal an additional [1].
Starting at level 8, when a melee attack hits you, the attacker is sent <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MAG_ATTACK_DEBUFF">Reeling</LSTag> for 3 turns.

Starting at level 6, then the wearer deals spell damage while illuminated by a light source, they also inflict <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MAG_RADIANT_RADIATING_ORB">Radiating Orb</LSTag> upon the target for [1] turns.
<LSTag Tooltip="AbilityModifer">Strength</LSTag> increases by [1] at levels 4 (up to 18), 8 (up to 22), and 12 (up to 24).
Starting at level 4, when you have 50% <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag> or less, you don't provoke <LSTag Tooltip="OpportunityAttack">Opportunity Attacks</LSTag>.
Starting at level 6, while obscured, you have <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>.
Starting at level 6, when you deal [1], the target receives [2] turn of <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MAG_RADIANT_RADIATING_ORB">Radiating Orb</LSTag>.
Starting at level 8, when <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DOWNED">Downed</LSTag>, automatically stabilise at the start of the turn.
<LSTag Tooltip="AbilityModifer">Dexterity</LSTag> increases by [1] at levels 4 (up to 18), 8 (up to 22), and 12 (up to 24).
Starting at level 6, while Obscured by shadow, you deal [1] to attackers that hit you with a melee attack.
Starting at level 6, when you deal Radiant damage, you cause a <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Projectile_MAG_Radiant_RadiatingOrb_Explosion">Radiant Shockwave</LSTag>.
More Things in Heaven and Earth
<LSTag Tooltip="AbilityModifer">Wisdom</LSTag> increases by [1] at levels 4 (up to 18), 8 (up to 22), and 12 (up to 24).
Starting at level 6, creatures who miss their <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">Attack Rolls</LSTag> against you must make a Dexterity <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag> or take [1].

Starting at level 8, while <LSTag Tooltip="Concentration">concentrating</LSTag>, you add your <LSTag Tooltip="SpellcastingAbilityModifier">Spellcasting Ability Modifier</LSTag> to your <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> and gain a +[1] bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="ArmourClass">Armour Class</LSTag>.
By the Pricking of my Thumbs
Skimpy, in the Dark Lady's own image.
Only the Darkest of Justiciars need apply.
Only the Darkest of Justiciars need apply. But, like. In the light. Or something anyway Shadowheart's the only Sharran Cleric who can be Light Domain so I hope she likes it.
We all wanna dress like Isobel.
Like Shadowheart's starting gear, but different.
When you wanna show some tummy while bringin' the light.
Leather and moonlight, a classic combo
Protect your light! Then smite with it.
Sleeker and speedier for all your light-on-the-dark-side-of-me needs.
I don't know what to call this. Just try it on and see if you like it! You'll look hot; I promise.
When you wanna show some tummy while bringin' the thunder.
Your pure hotness in this outfit will bring all the HP to the yard.
When you wanna show some tummy while bringin' the ... war?
Leather and moonlight, a classic combo
Sleeker and speedier for all your light-on-the-dark-side-of-me needs.
You can't keep everyone else alive if you can't keep yourself alive!
All this metal, good thing you have lightning resistance.
Dress like a tank! Move like a healer.
I don't know what to call this. Just try it on and see if you like it! You'll look hot; I promise.
Keep your hands free for healing
Leather and moonlight, still a classic combo!
Bared hands, hidden secrets. Or something.
Elegantly worked metal boots for the stylish Cleric on the go.
Less for sneaking, more for butt-kicking
Provides its wearer a touch of elegance but no additional protection. Now with buffs!
Provides its wearer a touch of elegance but no additional protection. Now with buffs!
A scarf and a helmet all in one!? What will they think of next??
Just like Isobel used to wear
A lovely cloak that looks even better bathed in moonlight.
Like a scarf you wear on your back.
Asymmetrical for the hell of it
Like a scarf you wear on your back! Not that Sharrans would do anything so whimsical.
Starting at level 6, you can cast Vicious Mockery once per turn.
<LSTag Tooltip="AbilityModifer">Constitution</LSTag> increases by [1] at levels 4 (up to 18), 8 (up to 22), and 12 (up to 24).
Starting at level 4, you gain <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="Concentration">Concentrating</LSTag> <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag>.
The Greater Should Your Courage Be

Starting at level 6, while you have <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SHIELD_OF_FAITH">Shield of Faith</LSTag> active, reduce all incoming damage by [1] and reflect damage received back at the attacker, who takes [2].
Starting at level 6, you gain resistance to [1] and [2].

Starting at level 6, while you have <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SHIELD_OF_FAITH">Shield of Faith</LSTag> active, reduce all incoming damage by [1] and reflect damage received back at the attacker, who takes [2].
Starting at level 8, you can't be <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="FRIGHTENED">Frightened</LSTag>, and cannot be afflicted with other emotion-altering conditions.
Show off those abs and flex some muscle.
The people's princess needs her tiara
It's like a halo, but darker
Maybe even creepier you be the judge
A mask. A crown. A secret well-kept.
When one wishes to express a modest sort of devotion.
A mask. A crown. A secret well-kept.
Metal bracers for protection, leather gloves for dexterity: the best of both worlds!
Most of you get a circlet of woven moonlight...but a select few get to look like She-Ra, Princess of Power!

An invisible aura surrounds you in a [1] radius. In combat, fiends and undead standing in range are <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">Blinded</LSTag>, unless they succeed a Constitution <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag>.

An invisible aura surrounds you in in a [1] radius. In combat, fiends and undead standing in range are <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">Blinded</LSTag>, unless they succeed a Constitution <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag>.

An invisible aura surrounds you in a [1] radius. In combat, fiends and undead standing in range are <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="BLINDED">Blinded</LSTag>, unless they succeed a Constitution <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throw</LSTag>.
An idol for Our Lady of Silver.
An onyx idol of the Dark Lady.
Waist: snatched. Dogs of war: unleashed.
Waist: snatched. Dogs of war: unleashed.
Just what it says on the tin: camp gear! All mashed up together, so I hope they can all get along.
For when gloves just won't do. (Body types 1 and 2 and Gith have bracelets; everyone else has cool ass gloves)
You can't keep everyone else alive if you can't keep yourself alive! And now with a bare right arm to flex those muscles. (for type 1 bodies)
A little bit country, a little bit rock n roll
We all wanna dress like Isobel. Bare-arm version, for type 1 bodies.
A lovely ribbon for your neck. I hope your head doesn't fall off if you untie it! (for body type 1 and femme shorties)

Enemies in a [1] radius receive a Disadvantage on attack rolls and Saving Throws.

Creatures that can't be Frightened are immune to this aura.

Your goddess grants you an oppressive aura that gives the affected entity <LSTag Tooltip="Disadvantage">Disadvantage</LSTag> on attack rolls and <LSTag Tooltip="SavingThrow">Saving Throws</LSTag> while within [1] of the spellcaster.

Enemies in a [1] radius receive Disadvantage on attack rolls and Saving Throws.

Creatures that can't be Frightened are immune to this aura.
%%% Lose the Name of Action Technical
Armour for your Death Domain Cleric of Selune
Armour for your Death Domain Cleric of Shar
Leather and moonlight, a classic combo
Protect your light! Then channel it for necrotic purposes.
Protect your light! Then channel it for necrotic purposes. (now with a bare right arm to flex your death-dealing muscles; type 1 bodies)
We all wanna dress like Isobel.
We all wanna dress like Isobel. With a bare right arm for type 1 bodies.
Show off those abs and flex some muscle.
Nightsong's armour is evocative of her personality - prickly, hardy, and about as agreeable as a clenched fist.
Skimpy, in the Dark Lady's own image.
Only the Darkest of Justiciars need apply. , like. In the light. Or something anyway Shadowheart's the only Sharran Cleric who can be Light Domain so I hope she likes it.But
Like Shadowheart's starting gear, but different.
Sleeker and speedier for all your death-on-silent-wings needs.
I don't know what to call this. Just try it on and see if you like it! You'll look hot; I promise.
Starting at level 8, when you deal Necrotic damage with a spell, allies within a [1] radius are healed for [2].
When you deal Necrotic damage with a spell, allies within a [1] radius are healed for [2].
Starting at level 10, your spell and weapon attacks inflict a curse upon your enemies, causing your attacks to do an additional [1] damage for [2] turns.
When you deal Necrotic damage, allies within a [1] radius are healed for [2].
Starting at level 8, on dealing Necrotic Damage with a spell, regain [1].
From the Lady herself, so she doesn't get her dainty hands dirty.
A fitted leather glove for when bulk just won't do.
Life Domain Sharran Armour - One Arm Version
Like Shadowheart's starting gear, but different. And with just 1 sleeve.
Light Domain Sharran Armour - One Arm Version
Tempest Domain Sharran Armour - One Arm Version
Death Domain Sharran Armour - One Arm Version
War Domain Sharran Armour - One Arm Version
One sleeve only applies for body type 1 humans, elves, and tieflings.
The one sleeve look only works for body type 1 humans, elves, and tieflings.
Life Domain Selunte Corset - One Sleeve Version
Waist: snatched. Lives: saved. All with just 1 sleeve.
Light Domain Selunte Corset - One Sleeve Version
Death Domain Selunte Corset - One Sleeve Version
Waist: snatched. Lives: critically endangered. All with just 1 sleeve.
Tempest Domain Selunte Corset - One Sleeve Version
Waist: snatched. Storms: summoned. All with just 1 sleeve.
War Domain Selunte Corset - One Sleeve Version
Waist: snatched. Dogs of war: unleashed. All with just 1 sleeve.
Life Domain Sharran Corset - One Sleeve Version
Waist: snatched. Lives: saved. All with just 1 sleeve.
Death Domain Sharran Corset - One Sleeve Version
Waist: snatched. Lives: critically endangered. All with just 1 sleeve.
Light Domain Sharran Corset - One Sleeve Version
Tempest Domain Sharran Corset - One Sleeve Version
Waist: snatched. Storms: summoned. All with just 1 sleeve.
War Domain Sharran Corset - One Sleeve Version
Waist: snatched. Dogs of war: unleashed. All with just 1 sleeve.
Life Domain Sharran Clothes - Sleeveless Version
I don't know what to call this. Just try it on and see if you like it! You'll look hot; I promise. Now sleeveless! For body type 1 humans, elves, tieflings, and dwarves only.
Death Domain Sharran Clothes - One Sleeve Version
Light Domain Sharran Clothes - One Sleeve Version
Tempest Domain Sharran Clothes - One Sleeve Version
War Domain Sharran Clothes - One Sleeve Version
I don't know what to call this. Just try it on and see if you like it! You'll look hot; I promise. Now sleeveless! For body type 1 humans, elves, tieflings, and dwarves only.
When you deal Necrotic damage with a spell, allies within a [1] radius are healed for [2].
Starting at level 6, you gain <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MAG_GISH_ARCANE_CHARGE">Arcane Charge</LSTag> whenever you are hit by a melee attack.
Starting at level 10, you can cast Reflective Shield once per short rest.
Put Your Shield Before Your Hearts
The Moonmaiden's favour allows you to summon a column of moonlight that deals [1] to foes that come within [2] of you or start their turn there.
The Dark Lady's favour allows you to summon an aura that deals [1] to foes that come within [2] of you or start their turn there.
Starting at level 12, the Moonmaiden's favour allows you to summon a column of moonlight that deals [1] to foes that come within [2] of you or start their turn there.
Imbued with the Moonmaiden's power, the darkest nights don't stand a chance against this radiant beacon.
Imbued with the Dark Lady's power, light, love, and hope don't stand a chance against this shadowy bulwark.

A ring of death surrounds you, dealing [1] to all enemies within [2].

Enemies that succeed a Constitution saving throw take half damage.
Creature is engulfed by ghastly flames that deal [1] per turn. On a successful save, the creature still takes half damage.
Surround yourself in a pillar of Selûne's light, inflicting <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="MOONBEAM">Moonbeam</LSTag> on nearby foes.
Surround yourself in Lady Shar's deathly aura, inflicting Circle of Death on nearby foes.
Starting at level 12, the Dark Lady's favour allows you to summon an aura that deals [1] to foes that come within [2] of you or start their turn there.
Only followers of Selune may equip this shield.
Only followers of Lady Shar may equip this shield.
